title: Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace 4
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|title=''Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace'' 4}} {{ComicBook |image=[[File:Tpmcomic4.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: Episode I —
The Phantom Menace'' 4 |writer=[[Henry Gilroy]] |penciller=[[Rodolfo Damaggio]] |inker=[[Al Williamson]] |letterer=[[Steve Dutro]] |colorist=[[David Nestelle|Dave Nestelle]] |cover artist=[[Hugh Fleming]] |editor=[[David Land|Dave Land]] |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[May 26]], [[1999]]{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/98-049/Star-Wars-Episode-I---The-Phantom-Menace-4-of-4|text=Star Wars: Episode I - The Phantom Menace #4 (of 4)}} |pages=32 |upc= |timeline=[[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |series=[[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace (comic series)|''Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace'']] |issue=4 |next=last }} '''''Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace'' 4''' was the fourth and final issue in the [[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace (comic series)|''Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace'' comic adaptation]] series of comics. It was released [[May 26]], [[1999]]. It covers approximately the final half-hour of the film, beginning with [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Queen Amidala]] planning the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''Dark Horse Comics proudly presents the comics adaptation of the long-awaited first Episode of the ''Star Wars'' saga. Adapted for comics by Henry Gilroy from an original screenplay by master movie maker George Lucas and artfully illustrated by Rodolfo Damaggio and comics legend Al Williamson, make sure you catch this legendary series that's sure to please ''Star Wars'' fans of all ages.'' ==Plot summary== {{Plot-link|Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace}} ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace 4}} ===Cover gallery=== File:Tpmcomic4.jpg|Cover File:SWEP1TPM4-FC.jpg|Cover art File:EpisodeITPM4-PhotoCover.jpg|Photo cover File:EpisodeITPM4_textless_photo_cover.png|Textless photo cover ===Collected in=== *[[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace (hardcover)|''Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace'' hardcover]] *''[[Star Wars Omnibus: The Complete Saga]]'' *''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: Rise of the Sith Vol. 2]]'' *''[[Star Wars Legends: Rise of the Sith Omnibus]]'' ==Appearances== {{IncompleteApp}} {{App |characters= |organisms= |droids= |events= |locations= |organizations= |species= |vehicles= |technology= |miscellanea= }} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/98-049/Star-Wars-Episode-I---The-Phantom-Menace-4-of-4|text=Star Wars: Episode I - The Phantom Menace #4 (of 4)}} *{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/99-033/Star-Wars-Episode-I---The-Phantom-Menace-4-of-4-photo-cover|text=Star Wars: Episode I - The Phantom Menace #4 (of 4) (photo cover)}} *{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54221/star_wars_episode_i_-_the_phantom_menace_1999_4|text=Star Wars: Episode I - The Phantom Menace (1999) #4}} {{Episode1Multimedia}} {{Interlang |es=Star Wars Episodio I: La Amenaza Fantasma 4 |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომები, ეპიზოდი I: ფარული მუქარა 4 |pl=Mroczne widmo 4 }} [[Category:Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace issues]]
